appShell.subtitle: Complete your pre check-in and arrive at the hotel without waiting at the reception.

validation.min_adults_booking: Must have at least 1 adult in the booking.
validation.future_birthdate: Date of birth cannot be in the future
validation.required_relationship: Must specify the relationship with companions
validation.invalid_phone: Phone must have 9-15 digits and may include + prefix.
validation.required_doc_support: Support number is required for ID and NIE
validation.required_email_or_phone: Please enter at least an email or phone number
validation.invalid_nie: Invalid NIE. Format: X/Y/Z + 7 digits + letter
validation.invalid_cif: Invalid CIF. Format: letter + 7 digits + letter/digit
validation.invalid_license: Invalid License. Expected format: up to 2 letters + 8 digits + letters
validation.missing_relationships: Missing relationships to fill. Review all guests' data.
validation.duplicate_doc: This document has already been registered for another guest.

search.subtitle: Enter your booking number to start the early check-in process
search.booking_hint: You can find your number in the booking confirmation email
search.error_no_contact: Please enter your email or phone.
search.error_not_found: No booking found with those details.

welcome.error_notice: If the number of people is incorrect or you wish to modify your booking, please contact the hotel before continuing.
welcome.question_minors: Are there minors in this booking?
welcome.title: Welcome to Lumina Hotels
welcome.subtitle_new: Complete your registration before arriving and avoid waiting at reception.
welcome.subtitle_known: We have your profile. Confirm or update your data to speed up your arrival.
welcome.how_to_review: How do you prefer to review your data?
welcome.how_to_complete: How do you prefer to complete your registration?
welcome.card_scan_sub: Take a photo of your ID or passport and we will fill in the data automatically.
welcome.card_manual_sub_new: Enter your information step by step. Quick and easy.
welcome.card_manual_sub_known: Check the data we have saved and confirm or modify it.

forms.adult_must_be_18: An adult must be at least 18 years old.
forms.minor_must_be_under_18: A minor cannot be 18 or older.
forms.main_guest_not_minor: The main guest cannot be a minor.
forms.name: First Name
forms.not_adult_error: Action not allowed. Main guest must be an adult. Please enter adult data.
forms.field_from_reservation: This field is filled from the reservation and cannot be modified
forms.adult_links_title: Relationship with minors in the group
forms.upload_photo: Upload photo of the back of your document

scan.title: Scan document
scan.subtitle: Place your ID or passport inside the frame and click capture. The data will be filled in automatically. This step is optional — you can skip it and fill everything manually.
scan.hint_center: Center the document in the frame
scan.upload_sub: JPG, PNG or PDF · Max. 20 MB
scan.privacy_note: Scanned documents will not be stored and only necessary data will be extracted.
scan.captured_sub: Click Process to extract data safely.
scan.btn_manual: I prefer to fill in manually
scan.error_size: File is too large. Max allowed is 20 MB.
scan.error_read: Could not read data clearly. Ensure good lighting, no blur, and no flash glare.

invalidLink.title: Invalid link
invalidLink.description: This link is invalid or has expired. Please access the check-in using the link provided in your booking confirmation email.
invalidLink.help: If you need assistance, please contact the front desk.

review.confirm_sub: We found your profile. Check that the data is correct before continuing.
review.confirm_alert: If any data has changed, click Edit to update it.
review.extras_sub: Additional optional info for your stay.
review.requests_info: Requests are subject to availability. The hotel will do its best to fulfill them, although they cannot be guaranteed in advance.
review.review_data_sub: Check that all info is correct before confirming the pre check-in.
review.btn_final: Confirm registration for the whole group
review.confirm_data_only: I confirm that the data is correct.

success.title: Registration completed!
success.subtitle_precheckin: Your data has been registered. Upon arrival at the hotel, go directly to the reception to collect your room key.
success.partial_sub: Data saved successfully. Share this link with the rest of the companions so they can complete their registration quickly and safely.
success.email_confirmation: You will receive an email confirmation
success.subtitle: Your data has been sent. See you at reception.

disabled.title: Pre-check-in unavailable
disabled.default_reason: For security or policy reasons, this booking requires in-person management.
disabled.instruction_2: where our team will help you complete your registration in a few minutes.
disabled.li_1: There may be a pending payment.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred. Your data is not lost — you can try to continue or reload the page.
errorBoundary.footer: If the problem persists, contact reception.

minors.declare_relationship_2: with each adult in the group.
minors.legal_warning_text: Hotels are required to register the relationship or guardianship of minors with accompanying adults.

legal.title: Legal Information and Privacy
legal.intro: In accordance with GDPR and current regulations:

sections.p: According to Organic Law 4/2015, all guests over 14 years old must be registered with the competent authorities.
Data from the traveler entry register will be kept for a period of 4 years, available to the Security Forces.
Your data will be used exclusively for managing your stay and complying with legal obligations regarding citizen security.

legal.footer: For more details, you can request the full document at reception.
legal.accept_check: I have read the legal information and accept the processing of my data.
